chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appln. No.1287 of 2024. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE This matter was reserved for orders on 02.09.2025. However, as the respondent no.5/Muhammad Haris s/o Mehtab Ahmed, a resident of Yousuf Goth, Surjani Town, has raised serious allegations against the applicant, proposed accused no.1, SHO Ghulam Hussain Peerzado, and eleven other proposed accused police officials from the same P.S. and/or P.S. Mangohpir, Karachi in Cr. Misc. Appln. No.4419/2024 before the Ex. Officio Justice of Peace, Karachi West, during the writing of this order, on further consideration, this matter requires a final opportunity of hearing to be afforded to respondent no.5 and certain additional documents to be placed before the bench, before the matter is finally adjudicated/decided. The respondent no.5 Counsel may be barred by the Bar Counsel, at present, hence his continuing non- appearance. Furthermore, attempts to serve notice on respondent no. 5 at his residence have been made by the same P.S. Surjani Town, whose entire police officials posted at P.S. Surjani Town at the material time were impleaded as proposed accused in the lis before the Ex Officio Justice of Peace. Repeated attempts to effect service through P.S. Surjani Town, have not been fruitful. Therefore, in the circumstances, office is directed to list the case for rehearing after notice to all concerned on 12.09.2024 at 09:00 a.m. J U D G E
